title: Senior Investment Banker at ICICI Bank

jsonLd.title: Senior Investment Banker at ICICI Bank
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with ICICI Bank! We are hiring a Investment Banker for our Madurai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About ICICI Bank:
ICICI Bank is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICICI Bank!
